notable_excerpts: We are investing significantly to make it easier for our colleagues to serve our customers through process re-engineering, automation and digitisation.
We have sharpened our proposition by customer segments. We have recently launched ‘Solitaire’, our proposition for the truly affluent segment.
As a Group, we navigated this period continuing on core principles of governance, prudence, risk management, control and compliance.
We have got a watchful eye on capital management and understand that this is lumpy and opportunistic.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call lacked any environmental disclosures, resulting in a score of 0 for the environmental pillar. The social pillar had moderate disclosures focusing on employee training and customer-centric strategies, scoring 60. Governance was the strongest pillar with detailed discussions on risk management and strategic capital allocation, scoring 75. The overall ESG score is calculated based on the weighted contributions of each pillar.
